title: Muthada Chammak Challo Lyrics Ra One Song Lyrics (Tamil)
stanzas:
Singers: Akon, Vishal Dadlani, Hamsika Iyer
Song: Muthada Chammak Challo
Lyrics: Vairamuthu
Movie: Ra one
Music by : Vishal-Shekhar

Girl you are my chammak challo
where you go girl, i am gonna follow
what you want girl, just let me know
oooh oooh ohh you can be my chammak challo
ooh ohh

Shortly i m gonna get ya
you know i m gonna get ya
you know i even let you
let you be my chammak challo

nee ennai yetru kondaal, kannil konjam kaatu
nee mattum illai enral nesikaathu  kaathu
pesatha vaarthai solli perinbathai kootu
vazhaasha vaazhkai vaazha vaa
wannabe my chammak challo o ohk oh(4)

muthaana chammak challo
mothathil sangathi ello
ithu ini en urimai allo oh oh oh
muthaana chammak challo

Shortly i m gonna get ya
you know i m gonna get ya
you know i even let you be my chammak challo

nee ennai yetru kondaal kannil konjam kaatu
nee mattum illai enral nesikaathu kaathu
pesatha vaarthai solli thenmathi koodu
vaalatha vaalkai vaazha vaa

Epodhum ne kan adipa, ne enna naughtyo..
Ellarum pathiruka, nikkatha partiya

ullathil kaadhalodu, ottika maattiyo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates the joy of attraction and the excitement of following someone special, encapsulating a playful and flirtatious vibe.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

In Ra One, the song highlights the romantic and fun interactions between the characters, adding a lively element to the film's narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features vocals by Akon, Hamsika Iyar, and Vishal Dadlani, with music composed by Vishal-Shekhar.

When was the song released?

Muthada Chammak Challo was released on October 23, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Muthada Chammak Challo, the upbeat tempo and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song conveys a sense of youthful exuberance and flirtation, making it a perfect fit for party scenes in Ra One. It evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to dance along. The collaboration of Akon and Indian artists adds a unique flavor, bridging cultures through music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Muthada Chammak Challo from Ra One is a vibrant fusion of beats and catchy lyrics that will get you on your feet. Featuring the unique collaboration of international star Akon alongside talented vocalists Hamsika Iyar and Vishal Dadlani, this song perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With its infectious energy and danceable rhythm, it's a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Girl, you are my chammak challo. Wherever you go, I will follow. Just let me know what you want. You can be my chammak challo.
Soon, I will get you. You know I will get you. I even let you be my chammak challo.
If you take me, show me a little. If you are not there, don't speak words that hurt. Life is about living together with love.
I want you to be my chammak challo.
My chammak challo, everything is about you. This is now my right.
Soon, I will get you. You know I will get you. I even let you be my chammak challo.
If you take me, show me a little. If you are not there, don't speak words that hurt. Life is about living together with love.
I want you to be my chammak challo.
Always, your eyes are captivating. You are so naughty. Everyone is watching, but you don't care. In India, you are so special, will love not change in my heart?
If you take me, show me a little. If you are not there, don't speak words that hurt. Life is about living together with love.
I want you to be my chammak challo.
